CONTENT.Honours: Red Bull SalzburgAustrian Bundesliga: 2021–22, 2022–23Austrian Cup: 2021–22Mali U-23U-23 Africa Cup of Nations third place: 2023
CONTENT.Club career: Diambou joined Red Bull Salzburg on 4 January 2021. After the agreement he was loaned to 2. Liga club Liefering.In 4 January 2023, Diambou signed for Swiss Super League club FC Luzern on loan until the end of the season.
CONTENT.External links: Mamady Diambou at SoccerwayMamady Diambou at FootballDatabase.euMamady Diambou at WorldFootball.netMamady Diambou at Red Bull Salzburg
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 2 August 2024As of match played on 26 March 2024
CONTENT.International career: In June 2023, Diambou was included in the final squad of the Malian under-23 national team for the 2023 U-23 Africa Cup of Nations, hosted in Morocco, where the Eagles finished in third place and qualified for the 2024 Summer Olympics in Paris.On 26 March 2024, he made his debut for the senior Mali national team and assisted a goal in a 2–0 victory over Nigeria in a friendly match.

SUMMARY: Mamady Diambou (born 11 November 2002) is a Malian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Austrian Bundesliga club Red Bull Salzburg and the Mali national team.
